microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model trusted by enterprise data engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model across cloud infrastructure.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating across platform, networking, and data infrastructure teams.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — applying LLM-powered automation to eliminate manual, high-toil processes across the resilience program.

Served as the trusted technical voice in architectural reviews with staff engineers and platform leads at partner organizations, mapping Azure's replication and recovery capabilities to customer data infrastructure requirements with clarity and measurable outcomes.

Defined mutual success criteria and structured execution plans for every enterprise resilience engagement, running each proof-of-value like a project — with clear milestones, stakeholder alignment, and post-execution field insights fed back to Product and Engineering.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI-powered workflow adoption** across 14 Azure service teams, conducting technical demos and hands-on training that surfaced integration gaps in customers' data pipelines and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** through targeted automation.

Shaped the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by running 11+ structured discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating field insights into actionable requirements for Engineering.

Accelerated data retrieval by **83%** by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform, improving reliability and lookup performance across distributed cloud infrastructure teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch time by 28% by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, directly reducing pipeline latency in Azure's cloud infrastructure rollout.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a roadmap to automate critical data-movement and operational workflows — mirroring the structured POC rigor required in enterprise pre-sales motions.

Enabled leadership to target **automation gaps** and prioritize high-impact investments by engineering a Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, turning raw pipeline data into actionable executive-level visibility.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping data and software dependencies across 1,200+ stations in a distributed warehouse infrastructure environment.

Resolved **40+ high-priority tickets** by facilitating Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, stabilizing the developer intake process and accelerating delivery of integration fixes across IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, reducing software deployment cycle time by 25% and establishing a repeatable, low-maintenance release model for robotics software.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM workflow that improved pipeline visibility and reduced proposal turnaround time.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to improve top-of-funnel data quality and lead targeting.

Strengthened **leadership pricing models** by conducting financial profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that tightened cost structures across high-volume service lines.
